subcodes.first_line: O Joseph! The Wronged One counseleth thee to embrace the shining Faith and the resplendent Law. We beseech God, exalted be He [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا یوسف ان المظلوم یوصیک بالمله البیضاء و الشریعه الغراء نسئل الله تعالی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @exhortations and counsels, @transcendence; unknowability of God
